Table	Create Table
aprovacao_comissao	CREATE TABLE `aprovacao_comissao` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `parceiroId` int NOT NULL,
  `servicoId` int NOT NULL,
  `percentualSolicitado` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL,
  `percentualPadrao` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL,
  `modeloParceriaId` int NOT NULL,
  `solicitadoPorId` int NOT NULL,
  `solicitadoEm` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `status` enum('pendente','aprovado','rejeitado') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  `aprovadoPorId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `aprovadoEm` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `observacao` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
